name: qianxin-fw-secgate3600-policy
description: OctoBus package for QIANXIN SecGate3600 firewall security-policy (sec_policy) APIs: login, list/set/move security policies, and logout.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_Policy.QIANXIN_FW.name: login
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_Policy.QIANXIN_FW.description: Login to SecGate3600 and cache the session.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_Policy.QIANXIN_FW.name: set-sec-policy
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_Policy.QIANXIN_FW.description: Add or modify SecGate3600 security policies.
